resources.name: deadw_by_decay_plot
resources.description: volumes of lying & standing deadwood per plot and per decay stage

fields.name: plottype
fields.description: CP:  circular plot; CA: core area

fields.name: plot_id
fields.description: unique sample plot id

fields.name: year
fields.description: year of dendro survey (year of growing season)
fields.extra_info: f.e. march 2020 becomes 2019 (start of growing season is set to May 1)

fields.name: period
fields.description: period: "1" for 1st decade (2000-2010), "2" for 2nd decade (2011-2020), "3" for 3th decade (2021-2030)
fields.extra_info: "0" only occurs for dendro data in plot 11000 (1986)

fields.name: decaystage
fields.description: decay stage code: from 10 to 15, with 10 very recent fallen and 15 fully decayed with remains in litter
fields.extra_info: see table "qDecaystage"; volume of lying deadwood per decaystage is unknown for circular plots Kersselaerspleyn (plot_id 2001-2065) 1st survey (2000)

fields.name: vol_dead_standing_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of standing deadwood per ha (m³/ha): tree bole + crown volume (if present) calculated using species specific volume functions (tariffs) based on height and diameter at breast height;  for snags formula of a cilinder is used
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing" and "tblTarieven_1ingKroon"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_bole_dead_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of standing tree bole (m³/ha) calculated using species specific volume functions (tariffs) based on height and diameter at breast height; for snags formula of a cilinder is used
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_log_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of lying deadwood per ha (m³/ha);  small fragments excluded (diameter < 10 cm or length < 1m; if diameter > 20 cm, length < 0,5m)
fields.extra_info: volume is calculated using Smalian’s formula

resources.name: dendro_by_diam_plot
resources.description: dendrometric values of living trees and deadwood per plot and diameter class
resources.extra_info: number of trees, basal area, volume, …

fields.name: plottype
fields.description: CP:  circular plot; CA: core area

fields.name: plot_id
fields.description: unique sample plot id

fields.name: year
fields.description: year of dendro survey (year of growing season)
fields.extra_info: f.e. march 2020 becomes 2019 (start of growing season is set to May 1)

fields.name: period
fields.description: period: "1" for 1st decade (2000-2010), "2" for 2nd decade (2011-2020), "3" for 3th decade (2021-2030)
fields.extra_info: "0" only occurs for dendro data in plot 11000 (1986)

fields.name: dbh_class_5cm
fields.description: diameter class per 5 cm (5 - 10 cm, 10 - 15 cm, …, 155 - 160 cm)

fields.name: stem_number_alive_ha
fields.description: number of living stems per ha (1/ha) - small stems excluded (dbh < 5 cm)

fields.name: stem_number_dead_ha
fields.description: number of dead stems per ha (1/ha) - small stems excluded (dbh < 5 cm)

fields.name: basal_area_alive_m2_ha
fields.description: basal area of living trees per ha (m²/ha) - small trees excluded (dbh < 5 cm)

fields.name: basal_area_dead_m2_ha
fields.description: basal area of standing deadwood per ha (m²/ha) - small trees excluded (dbh < 5 cm)

fields.name: vol_alive_m3_ha
fields.description: standing volume of living trees per ha (m³/ha): tree bole + crown volume calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height;  small trees excluded (dbh < 5 cm)
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing" and "tblTarieven_1ingKroon"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm

fields.name: vol_dead_standing_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of standing deadwood per ha (m³/ha): tree bole + crown volume calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height;  small trees excluded (dbh < 5 cm)
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing" and "tblTarieven_1ingKroon"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm

fields.name: vol_bole_alive_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of tree bole (m³/ha) calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_bole_dead_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of tree bole (m³/ha) calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: idem

fields.name: vol_log_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of lying deadwood per ha (m³/ha);  small fragments excluded (diameter < 10 cm or length < 1m; if diameter > 20 cm, length < 0,5m)
fields.extra_info: volume is calculated using Smalian’s formula

resources.name: dendro_by_plot
resources.description: dendrometric values of living trees and deadwood on plot level
resources.extra_info: number of tree species, number of trees, basal area, volume …

fields.name: plottype
fields.description: CP:  circular plot; CA: core area

fields.name: plot_id
fields.description: unique sample plot id

fields.name: year
fields.description: year of dendro survey (year of growing season)
fields.extra_info: f.e. march 2020 becomes 2019 (start of growing season is set to May 1)

fields.name: period
fields.description: period: "1" for 1st decade (2000-2010), "2" for 2nd decade (2011-2020), "3" for 3th decade (2021-2030)
fields.extra_info: "0" only occurs for dendro data in plot 11000 (1986)

fields.name: number_of_tree_species
fields.description: number of tree species
fields.extra_info: only living species with dbh > 7 cm

fields.name: number_of_trees_ha
fields.description: number of living individuals per ha (1/ha)
fields.extra_info: coppice is considered as one tree  - small stems (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: stem_number_ha
fields.description: number of living stems per ha (1/ha)
fields.extra_info: small stems (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: basal_area_alive_m2_ha
fields.description: basal area of living trees per ha (m²/ha)
fields.extra_info: small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: basal_area_dead_m2_ha
fields.description: basal area of standing deadwood per ha (m²/ha)
fields.extra_info: small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_alive_m3_ha
fields.description: standing volume of living trees per ha (m³/ha): tree bole + crown volume calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing" and "tblTarieven_1ingKroon"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_dead_standing_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of standing deadwood per ha (m³/ha): tree bole + crown volume calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: idem

fields.name: vol_bole_alive_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of tree bole (m³/ha) calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_bole_dead_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of tree bole (m³/ha) calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: idem

fields.name: vol_log_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of lying deadwood per ha (m³/ha);  small fragments excluded (diameter < 10 cm or length < 1m; if diameter > 20 cm, length < 0,5m)
fields.extra_info: volume is calculated using Smalian’s formula (except for circular plots Kersselaerspleyn (2001-2065) 1st survey (2000):  volume of fallen trees is based on tariffs, and if necessary cut of at border of the plot)

fields.name: vol_deadw_m3_ha
fields.description: total volume deadwood per ha (m³/ha) -  lying + standing
fields.extra_info: vol_log_m3_ha + vol_dead_standing_m3_ha

fields.name: stems_per_tree
fields.description: mean number of stems per tree
fields.extra_info: additional info for coppice

resources.name: dendro_by_plot_species
resources.description: dendrometric values of living trees and deadwood per plot and per species
resources.extra_info: number of trees, basal area, volume, mean number of stems per tree (info on copppice), …

resources.name: vegetation_by_core_area_species
resources.description: vegetation characteristics per species for the entire core area
resources.extra_info: mean coverage, number and percentage of subplots where species occurs, info on browsing

fields.name: plot_id
fields.description: unique sample plot id

fields.name: year
fields.description: year of recording of specific species, possibly different for spring flora

fields.name: period
fields.description: period: "1" for 1st decade (2000-2010), "2" for 2nd decade (2011-2020), "3" for 3th decade (2021-2030)

fields.name: species
fields.description: species code
fields.extra_info: see table "qHerbSpecies240810"

fields.name: perc_of_subplots
fields.description: percentage of subplots where the species occurs

fields.name: number_of_subplots_browsed
fields.description: number of subplots with traces of browsing (< 5% of individuals browsed)
fields.extra_info: recorded since 2015

fields.name: number_of_subplots_seriously_browsed
fields.description: number of subplots with significant traces of browsing (> 5% of individuals browsed)
fields.extra_info: recorded since 2015

fields.name: perc_of_subplots_browsed
fields.description: percentage of subplots with traces of browsing (< 5% of individuals browsed)
fields.extra_info: recorded since 2015

fields.name: perc_of_subplots_seriously_browsed
fields.description: percentage of subplots with significant traces of browsing (> 5% of individuals browsed)
fields.extra_info: recorded since 2015

fields.name: mean_coverage_class_average_perc
fields.description: mean coverage of all subplots where the species occurs; based on midpoint values of the respective cover classes

resources.name: vegetation_by_plot
resources.description: vegetation characteristics on plot level (or subplot level in case of core area)
resources.extra_info: number of species, total cover per vegetation layer (moss-, herb-, shrub-, tree- and waterlayer), soildisturbance by game

fields.name: plot_id
fields.description: unique sample plot id

fields.name: period
fields.description: period: "1" for 1st decade (2000-2010), "2" for 2nd decade (2011-2020), "3" for 3th decade (2021-2030)

fields.name: subplot_id
fields.description: id of subplot (1 for circular plots)
fields.extra_info: corea area's are divided in subplots of 10 x 10 m²

fields.name: number_of_species
fields.description: number of species in the herb layer (herbaceous and woody species (< 200cm))

fields.name: cumm_herb_coverage_class_average_perc
fields.description: cumulated coverage of all species in the herb  layer; based on midpoint values of the respective cover classes
fields.extra_info: in case of core area, mean of all subplots

fields.name: year_main_survey
fields.description: year of main vegetation survey
fields.extra_info: "main": because sometimes deviating from date of spring survey (for spring flora)

fields.name: date_vegetation
fields.description: date of main vegetation survey

fields.name: moss_cover_min
fields.description: cover of the moss layer, estimated using Londo scale and transformed into percentage values (min, max  and midpoint of respective cover class)
fields.extra_info: extended Londo scale (Londo, 1984); bryophytes are not identified

fields.name: herb_cover_min
fields.description: cover of the herbaceous layer, estimated using Londo scale and transformed into percentage  (min, max  and midpoint of respective cover class)values
fields.extra_info: extended Londo scale (Londo, 1984)

fields.name: shrub_cover_min
fields.description: cover of the shrub layer (2-8m height), estimated using Londo scale and transformed into percentage values (min, max  and midpoint of respective cover class)
fields.extra_info: extended Londo scale (Londo, 1984)

fields.name: tree_cover_min
fields.description: cover of the tree layer (> 8m height), estimated using Londo scale and transformed into percentage values (min, max  and midpoint of respective cover class)
fields.extra_info: extended Londo scale (Londo, 1984)

fields.name: waterlayer_cover_min
fields.description: area covered by open water, estimated using Londo scale and transformed into percentage values (min, max  and midpoint of respective cover class)
fields.extra_info: extended Londo scale (Londo, 1984)

fields.name: soildisturbance_game_cover_min
fields.description: bare soil due to disturbance by game, estimated using Londo scale and transformed into percentage values (min, max  and midpoint of respective cover class)
fields.extra_info: recorded since 2015

fields.name: soildisturbance_game_cover_max
fields.extra_info: recorded since 2015

fields.name: soildisturbance_game_cover_mid
fields.extra_info: recorded since 2015

fields.name: cumulated_canopy_cover_min
fields.description: cumulated shrub and tree cover
